shanta-fixed-income-fund.source: Shanta Asset Management quarterly portfolio statement

shanta-amanah-shariah-fund.source: Shanta Asset Management quarterly portfolio statement

shanta-first-income-unit-fund.source: Shanta Asset Management quarterly portfolio statement

bcb-icl-growth-fund.note: T-bonds held at fair value; the Tk 20 lakh BRAC Bank subordinated bond is carried at cost in the statement.

icl-balanced-fund.note: The statement's sector column uses merged cells; labels were resolved against the identical scrips' printed sectors in the sibling BCB ICL Growth Fund statement and DSE classification.

icl-inctl-shariah-fund.note: Shariah-screened portfolio: govt holdings are Socio Economic Development Sukuk and deposits are Islamic (Mudaraba); non-compliant dividend income is purified per the DSE Shariah Index ratio.

esquire-icl-apparel-fund.note: Apparel-themed by mandate (sponsor: Esquire Knit Composite), but at 31 Mar 2026 the fund held no textile or apparel stocks; three scrips' sector cells are blank in the source and were assigned Pharmaceuticals & Chemicals per DSE classification.
